title: Auto Reload Crossbow
description: Crossbows will auto reload from your quiver.

title: Auto Reload Grenade Launcher
description: Grenade Launchers will auto reload from ammo in your backpack when empty.

title: Auto Reload Revolver
description: Revolvers will auto reload from ammo placed inside your backpack

title: Auto Reload Shotgun
description: Shotguns will auto reload from ammo placed inside your backpack.

title: Expanded Pockets
description: +1 Capacity to all backpacks you purchase.

title: Hidden Compartment
description: +1 Capacity to all backpacks you purchase.

title: Even More Pockets
description: +1 Capacity to all backpacks you purchase.

title: Backpack Plushie Keychain
description: Adds a plushie keychain to every backpack you own

title: Buff Extension
description: +10% time added to consumables and buffs

title: Buff Extension+
description: +25% time added to consumables and buffs

title: Buff Extension++

title: Defense
description: -5% to all damage taken

title: Defense+

description: Revolvers can hold an extra bullet.
